name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
summary: Income support of ₹6,000/year for landholding farmer families, paid in 3 installments of ₹2,000 via DBT.
exclusions: Constitutional post holders / MPs / MLAs / Ministers
Professionals registered with statutory bodies (doctors, engineers, lawyers, CAs, architects)

name: NSAP – Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
summary: Monthly pension for BPL senior citizens aged 60+, with higher amount after age 80.
amount: ₹200/month (age 60–79), ₹500/month (age 80+) — central share; many states top this up
exclusions: Already covered under another NSAP pension component

name: Ayushman Bharat – PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
summary: Cashless health insurance of ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization at empanelled hospitals. All citizens 70+ qualify regardless of income.
exclusions: Not listed in SECC-2011 database (unless aged 70+)
Covered already under CGHS/ECHS with no opt-in

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
summary: ₹50,000/year for girl students in 1st year (or 2nd year lateral entry) of AICTE-approved diploma/degree technical courses.
exclusions: More than 2 girls per family already availing
Receiving another central/state scholarship for the same purpose
